positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized vector illustration of a bioluminescent forest clearing at dusk. The central element features intricate silhouettes of whimsical flora, glowing mushrooms, and graceful deer profiles. The color palette should be restricted to deep indigo, emerald green, cyan, and metallic gold highlights, achieving a strong, ethereal contrast. Style is a blend of Art Deco graphic poster design and delicate watercolor wash, emphasizing clean, solid silhouettes and minimal shading. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, designed for repeat printing on textile material. Highly detailed, high contrast, clean lines, magic realism, mystical, symmetry.
negative: lowres, blurry, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, smudge, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, messy, gradient (unless specified as glow)
